feat.name: Piercing Doom
feat.text: You have grown accustomed to the curse that comes with your blessing, able to channel its effects through your attacks and forestall your own demise. Make a melee Strike; on a success, the target takes an additional 1d10 void damage and your doomed value is reduced by 1.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
